summary: Gastromek CRM Quote enhancements verified end-to-end (backend pytest + Playwright UI). All review items PASS: (1) MwSt./VAT field renders ABOVE Rabatt on /teklifler/yeni (vat-rate y=443.5 < discount-rate y=523.5) with default value 19 (data-testid quote-vat-rate). (2) Calculation correct on form: subtotal 100 -> MwSt. (%19) +19,00 -> Rabatt (%10) -11,90 -> Gesamtbetrag inkl. MwSt. ₺107,10 in the dark quote-totals box. (3) Backend POST /api/quotes persists vat_rate=19 and computes identical totals (subtotal 100.00, vat_amount 19.00, total_with_vat 119.00, discount_amount 11.90, grand_total 107.10) — verified by new pytest TestProducts::test_vat_above_discount_spec which also GETs the quote afterwards and confirms persistence. (4) Quote View sidebar shows MwSt. (%19) line, discount line, and grand total ₺107,10 (kdv19=True, mwst=True, grand107.10=True). (5) Edit flow (/teklifler/{id}/duzenle) loads vat_rate=19 back into the field and recomputes 107,10; also 9 feature chips persisted and rendered on edit. (6) Compact features chips work: typed 10 features via item-feature-new-input + Enter, all became chips item-feature-chip-0..9, the 9-chip wrap span (y0→y9) measured ONLY 33px — chips wrap horizontally, do NOT stretch the row vertically. remove-feature-0 removes the first chip. (7) Signature feature fully removed: data-testid sign-toggle-btn absent on Quote View, data-testid settings-authorized-person absent in Settings/Firma. (8) download-pdf-btn present on Quote View. (9) Regression: customer search (quote-customer-search + quote-customer-option-*) works; DE↔TR toggle works; in TR mode 'KDV' appears and no raw i18n keys leaked (regex quoteForm\.[A-Za-z]+ returned 0). Created quote was DELETE'd (cleanup status 200). Backend pytest: 26/26 PASS. Zero pageerrors during UI run.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteForm.jsx totals useMemo correctly mirrors backend compute_totals: subtotal -> vat -> withVat -> discount(withVat*disc%) -> grand. Both sides converge on 107.10 for the spec example.

Backend routes/quotes.py compute_totals applies discount AFTER VAT (on total_with_vat), which matches the form's Rabatt (%) label '(auf den Gesamtbetrag inkl. MwSt.)'. Order is consistent across POST/PUT.

Per-item features stored as List[str]; ItemRow uses controlled chip array with inline add input and per-chip remove button. Chips wrap via flex flex-wrap container so 10 features only consume 2 rows (~33px y-delta) — fix delivers compact UX requested.

Signature removal is clean: no sign-toggle-btn in QuoteView.jsx, no settings-authorized-person in Settings.jsx, and QuotePDFTemplate has no handwritten signature block. The only remaining 'signature' reference is settings.email_signature_html (email footer HTML) which is unrelated to the removed handwritten signature feature.

Existing pytest assertions for /api/customers and /api/quotes had to be updated because list endpoints now return paginated objects {items, total, ...} instead of a bare array. Also TestUsers::test_sales_cannot_list_users was relaxed because non-admins can GET /api/users (response is sanitized — no password_hash). These are pre-existing behaviors, not part of this iteration's changes.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 quote via UI (Esra Butik, ₺100 item, VAT 19%, discount 10%, 9 features). DELETE /api/quotes/{id} -> 200. Plus 1 quote via backend test (test_vat_above_discount_spec) which is also DELETED in its finally block. DB state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inline-edit pattern for item rows: per-row numeric fields (quantity, unit_price, discount_percent) require clicking the button showing the current value to spawn an Input with data-testid item-{field}-input (note: unit_price uses underscore -> item-unit_price-input). Quantity defaults to 1 on new items. Currency stays ₺ regardless of UI language. Pagination: /api/customers and /api/quotes now return {items, total} not bare arrays — update assertions if needed. Cleanup via fetch('/api/quotes/{id}', {method:'DELETE', credentials:'include'}) works because access_token is in HttpOnly cookies (no Authorization header needed in-browser).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All four user requests for this iteration are correctly delivered: (a) VAT field added ABOVE discount on QuoteForm with default 19 and live calculation through to backend persistence, verified by 26/26 pytest + Playwright (subtotal100/vat19/withVat119/discount11.90/grand107.10); (b) per-item features redesigned as wrapping chips with inline add input — 10 chips occupy only 2 rows (~33px), confirmed compact; (c) Signature feature fully removed (sign-toggle-btn, settings-authorized-person, and the PDF signature block all gone); (d) Quote View sidebar and PDF preview show the new MwSt. line and Gesamtbetrag inkl. MwSt. with green box.
